name: Marumi Fit + Slim MC Lens Protect
description: This new series of filters from Marumi helps to protect your lens from dust and scratches. These ultra slim filters are lightweight and approx. 11g in weight. They are supplied in smart packaging made from eco-friendly lead fee materials.

features.General Features: Protects your lens from dust and scratches | Secure Lens Cap Holding | Available in screw in sizes from 37 -82mm | Multi Coating Glass and Satin Finished Frame | Eco-friendly Filters Made of Lead Free Materials
